explanation: The user instructs to clean the mug, which is currently being held. Since the mug is dirty and needs to be cleaned, I first place it in the sinkbasin to allow washing. I then turn on the faucet to ensure water is flowing, pick up the mug again to ensure it is properly rinsed, and finally turn off the faucet. This sequence ensures the mug is cleaned properly and returned to a safe state.
